# External Reference Documents — Post Office Horizon

Place external reference documents here for ArcKit commands to read and cite:

- Organisational charts, governance structures, board terms of reference
- Existing stakeholder maps and RACI matrices
- Vendor and supplier materials, contracts, tender documents
- Policy documents, standards, regulatory guidance

Supported formats include PDF, Word, and images. ArcKit commands read these to ground analysis in source material and create citation traceability.

> Programme-level background research on the Post Office Horizon system, scandal, inquiry and replacement is held at `projects/000-global/external/post-office-horizon-research.md`.
